channel.name: logistics
channel.purpose: Coordination of supplies, equipment, and delivery schedules
channel.creator: U03JOHN03

messages.text: Delivery schedule update: 500 mangrove seedling trays arriving Tuesday. Need 3 volunteers for unloading at the Can Gio depot.

replies.text: I can coordinate the volunteers. We have 8 people confirmed for Tuesday.
Perfect. The truck arrives at 7am. Please have everyone at the depot by 6:45am.

messages.text: ⚠️ Supplier issue: The water quality testing kit order (PO-2026-0189) has been delayed. Original delivery was July 15, now pushed to July 29.

replies.text: This impacts the monitoring milestone. Let's discuss alternatives in the next standup.
